description_long: This is an ornate pendant chandelier featuring a cylindrical metal frame with intricate filigree patterns. The frame encircles several candle-style bulb holders, each with a decorative faux wax-drip design, arranged symmetrically around a central axis. The chandelier is suspended from a chain and canopy, both of which are also metal and match the frame's finish. The filigree work is delicate and highly detailed, giving the lamp a vintage or classical aesthetic. The overall structure is open, allowing light to pass through the patterned metalwork and cast decorative shadows. The lamp is designed to be a statement piece, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: An ornate cylindrical pendant chandelier with intricate metal filigree and multiple candle-style bulbs, suspended by a chain. The openwork design creates a decorative, classical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed filigree pattern and the arrangement of candle-style bulbs within the cylindrical frame.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the side filigree and the symmetrical placement of the bulbs.
description_view_2: Rear angled view highlighting the open structure and the continuity of the decorative metalwork around the frame.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the cylindrical shape, chain suspension, and the even spacing of the bulbs inside.
